colors.description: Warm bone/sand backgrounds with deep forest green text. Avoids harsh blacks, pure whites, and generic neon/purple tech gradients. Uses Terracotta for alerts instead of pure red.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-foreground
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-tight text-foreground
scale.overline: text-xs font-sans font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground

typography.instructions: Import Google fonts in index.html or via CSS @import. Apply font-serif to headings and font-sans to body. Create an editorial hierarchy.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-6, p-8, and p-12. Avoid cramped data density. Think editorial magazine layout.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid but airy. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Clean, hidden on mobile (hamburger), fixed on desktop. Border-right only (border-border), no shadows.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: Flat Solid variant. bg-card with a delicate 1px border-border. No heavy drop shadows by default. Use shadow-sm only for elevation on hover.
surfaces_and_borders.radius: rounded-2xl for main cards to give a softer, approachable, human touch.
surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: Used only for sticky headers: bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border.

components.button: Pill shaped (rounded-full) or rounded-xl. Primary uses deep forest green (primary). Hover state lightens slightly with a smooth transition.
components.tabs: Editorial style: underline indicators instead of pill backgrounds. text-muted-foreground for inactive, text-primary for active.
components.input: rounded-xl, border-border, bg-card, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary. Soft, clean and minimal.
components.table: Minimalist. border-b only on rows, no vertical lines. text-sm for data, generous py-4 padding.
components.sidebar_links: Subtle hover with bg-accent/30 text-foreground. Active state gets a 2px left border in primary color and bg-accent/50.
components.badges: rounded-full, subtle tinted backgrounds. e.g., bg-primary/10 text-primary for positive, bg-destructive/10 text-destructive for urgent.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle lift (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow-sm on interactive cards. Buttons darken/lighten smoothly.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-in for bento grid items using framer-motion.

iconography.style: Stroke width 1.5. Clean, minimalist. Do not use filled icons.

images.description: Professional confident portrait for the user profile header or settings.
Clean minimalist office desk featuring a bonsai plant for natural decoration and serenity. Use for 'All Caught Up' states, Document Storage empty states, or hero areas.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Deep green on warm sand passes easily.
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings on all inputs/buttons (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid="pay-bill-button").

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React JS application (.js/.jsx files). DO NOT output TypeScript (.tsx).
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the bento grid layout and Shadcn for complex interactive parts (Dialog, Select, Calendar, Tabs).
Update Shadcn CSS variables in index.css with the exact HSL values provided in the colors section.
Never use raw 'Inter', 'Roboto'. Inject Manrope and Cormorant Garamond via standard CSS imports or Google Fonts.
Create an 'editorial' feel: generous padding, distinct overlines for category tags, and muted secondary text.
For the AI Chat Assistant component, design it like a sleek drawer or a calm overlay, not a floating 'bubble' chatbot. It should feel like writing an email to a highly organized secretary.
Avoid typical dashboard cliches: NO bright red/green positive/negative indicators. Use Terracotta (destructive) for urgent, Deep Green (primary) for positive.
Run linting on components after making structural edits.
